response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided reference lyrics and structure. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided song lyrics and structure for timing the music segment, and manually transcribed/translated the conversational parts. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly synced to the vocal starts to avoid cascading delays, breaking up longer utterances into readable semantic chunks.

subtitles.original: ゆらぐ心をめぐる感情くすぐる
subtitles.english: Emotions circling my wavering heart are tickling me.

subtitles.original: 一度じゃ甘いの？せーしょん
subtitles.english: Is once not sweet enough? Sensation.

subtitles.original: 癒やされたい 甘えていたいとゆう
subtitles.english: Want to be healed, want to be spoiled, a...

subtitles.original: ちょこせんせーしょん
subtitles.english: ...Choco-sensation.

subtitles.original: 君の視線 君の体温
subtitles.english: Your perspective, your body temperature...

subtitles.original: わかってても恋は測れない
subtitles.english: ...even if I know them, love cannot be measured.

subtitles.original: 元気なのにため息しちゃう
subtitles.english: Even though I'm energetic, I find myself sighing.

subtitles.original: もしかしてもう手遅れ？
subtitles.english: Could it be that it's already too late?

subtitles.original: でも どっちどっちするまで動けないから
subtitles.english: But I can't move until I decide one way or the other...

subtitles.original: ドキドキ運んできてね 毎終電
subtitles.english: ...so please bring the excitement, on every last train.

subtitles.original: ちょこちょこ せーしょん (いぇい！)
subtitles.english: Choco-choco-sensation (Yay!)

subtitles.original: ちょこちょこ せーしょん (いぇい！)
subtitles.english: Choco-choco-sensation (Yay!)

subtitles.original: ちょこちょこ せーしょん (いぇい！)
subtitles.english: Choco-choco-sensation (Yay!)

subtitles.original: ちょこちょこ せーしょん (いぇい！)
subtitles.english: Choco-choco-sensation (Yay!)

subtitles.original: 絶対君もダメにしたい
subtitles.english: I definitely want to spoil you too.

subtitles.original: はーい！ということで！
subtitles.english: Hi! And so!

subtitles.original: 癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026、始まりました！
subtitles.english: Yuzuki Choco Birthday Celebration 2026 has begun!

subtitles.original: 見て見て！一曲目から、ちょこ、生まれ変わりました！
subtitles.english: Look, look! From the very first song, Choco has been reborn!

subtitles.original: いや、今日はね、原点回帰ということで...
subtitles.english: Well, today, as a return to my roots...

subtitles.original: ちょこのなんと、保健室ステージなの！
subtitles.english: ...it's actually Choco's school nurse's office stage!

subtitles.original: いや、ちょっと保健室もちょっと生まれ変わって...
subtitles.english: Yes, the school nurse's office has also been reborn...

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ可愛くなりました！
subtitles.english: ...and has become super cute!

subtitles.original: シチュエーションドラマとかできそうだよね！
subtitles.english: It looks like we could do situation dramas here!

subtitles.original: 今日は生まれ変わったニューちょこと、
subtitles.english: Today, along with the reborn New Choco...

subtitles.original: 素敵なゲスト様をいっぱい呼んで、ライブをしていくんだけど...
subtitles.english: ...I've invited lots of wonderful guests to do a live show, but...

subtitles.original: その前にみんな、ちょこのこと、もっと見たいよね？
subtitles.english: ...before that, everyone wants to see more of Choco, right?

subtitles.original: あ、でも、まだダメだよ？
subtitles.english: Ah, but not just yet, okay?

subtitles.original: これから来るお二人に、ちょこの撮影会をご依頼しちゃいました！
subtitles.english: I've requested a photoshoot of Choco from the two who are coming!

subtitles.original: それでは早速呼んでいきましょう！
subtitles.english: So without further ado, let's call them out!

subtitles.original: ノエル様！ラミィ様！
subtitles.english: Noel-sama! Lamy-sama!

subtitles.original: あーー！わーー！
subtitles.english: Ahhh! Woahhh!

subtitles.original: 来たよー！
subtitles.english: We're here!

subtitles.original: せーの、ちょこ先生、
subtitles.english: One, two... Choco-sensei!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうー！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Thank you! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: えー、ということで今回はね、この可愛い両手に花で...
subtitles.english: So, this time, with flowers in both of my hands...

subtitles.original: 可愛いお二人に、ちょっとね、ちょこの撮影会をしてってもらおうと思うんですけど...
subtitles.english: ...I'd like these two cuties to do a photoshoot of Choco...

subtitles.original: まずは自己紹介よろしくお願いします！ノエルから！
subtitles.english: ...but first, please introduce yourselves! Noel, go ahead!

subtitles.original: はい！えー、こんまっする！ホロライブ三期生の白銀ノエルと、
subtitles.english: Yes! Kon-muscle! I'm Shirogane Noel, Hololive's 3rd gen...

subtitles.original: はい！ホロライブ五期生の、顔が肝臓、雪花ラミィです！
subtitles.english: And I'm Yukihana Lamy, Hololive's 5th gen, whose face is a liver!

subtitles.original: 今日はよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: We look forward to working with you today!

subtitles.original: まあね、ちょこ先生の本当に可愛くなったところを...
subtitles.english: Well, since Choco-sensei has gotten so cute...

subtitles.original: ちょっと団長頑張って、攻めていこうと思いますので、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: ...the Commander is going to do her best to be aggressive, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: 攻めて、攻めて、攻めて！
subtitles.english: Attack, attack, attack!

subtitles.original: ラミィもギリギリを攻めていきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: Lamy is also going to push the limits!

subtitles.original: いや、撮影会やるなら、このお二人を呼ぶしかないかなって思って、呼んじゃいました！
subtitles.english: Well, if I was going to do a photoshoot, I thought I had to invite these two!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！
subtitles.english: We're so happy!

subtitles.original: いや、しかも、しかも、ちょっと、あとね、この三人から、なんと、お知らせもあるみたいなので、
subtitles.english: And moreover, the three of us also have an announcement to make!

subtitles.original: お知らせ！？気になる！気になる！
subtitles.english: An announcement?! I'm curious! I'm curious!

subtitles.original: 撮影会のあとで、皆様、楽しみにしててください！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it after the photoshoot!

subtitles.original: 楽しみだー！
subtitles.english: We can't wait!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、ちょっと、こちらで撮影会、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Well then, please take charge of the photoshoot here!

subtitles.original: はーい！行こう、行こう！
subtitles.english: Okay! Let's go, let's go!

subtitles.original: えっほ、えっほ、えっほ、えっほ...
subtitles.english: Heave-ho, heave-ho, heave-ho...

subtitles.original: お！なんかすごいとこ来たぞ！
subtitles.english: Oh! We've come to an amazing place!

subtitles.original: え、すごい！可愛い！
subtitles.english: Wow, amazing! So cute!

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ！可愛いでしょ！
subtitles.english: Cute, right? Super cute, right?

subtitles.original: 撮影会は、ちょこのここの、診察室でやります！
subtitles.english: The photoshoot will take place here in Choco's examination room!

subtitles.original: おー！診察室だ！ちょこ先生の診察室！すげえ、可愛い！可愛い！
subtitles.english: Oh! The examination room! Choco-sensei's examination room! It's so cute!
